# userSessions

Lists the sessions of a user. Can only be called by an admin or owner.

## Signature

- Root: `Queries`
- Return Type: [[`AuthenticationSessionResponse`](../objects/authentication_session_response-object.md)!]!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The identifier of the user to list sessions of. |
